api/client/python/openmeter.purpose: Public import surface for the OpenMeter Python SDK — a thin shim that re-exports the generated client, models, and operations from _generated/ behind stable, version-pinned import paths. No business logic lives here; the only hand-authored customizations are the public Client subclass (with Bearer-token auth) and the _types.py union aliases. Everything else under _generated/ is overwritten by make gen-api.

patterns.name: Client subclasses generated OpenMeterClient
patterns.description: _client.py defines Client(OpenMeterClient) and injects Bearer auth via ServiceKeyCredential + ServiceKeyCredentialPolicy only when a token is given and no authentication_policy was passed. All operation routing is inherited, never re-implemented; __enter__/__exit__ delegate to super().

patterns.name: _patch_sdk() called at module end
patterns.description: Every facade __init__.py (here and in models/, operations/, aio/) must call _patch_sdk() after all imports so runtime patches from _generated/_patch.py apply. Omitting it silently disables every customization.

patterns.name: Graceful _patch ImportError guard
patterns.description: All imports of _patch symbols are wrapped in try/except ImportError with _patch_all = [] fallback, so the package still loads in deployments that ship no _patch.py.

patterns.name: __all__ extension from _patch_all
patterns.description: __all__ is declared with explicit public names then extended with _patch_all entries not already present, preserving forward compatibility as new symbols are patched in.
patterns.example:
__all__ = ['Client']
__all__.extend([p for p in _patch_all if p not in __all__])

patterns.name: Union type aliases with string forward references
patterns.description: _types.py defines discriminated Union aliases (App, RateCard, Entitlement, SubscriptionEditOperation, NotificationRule, etc.) using string-quoted forward references to _models under TYPE_CHECKING to avoid circular imports at runtime.

key_file_guides.role: Defines the public Client class — subclasses generated OpenMeterClient and injects Bearer-token auth. Only constructor defaults and auth wiring belong here.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Never add operation methods here — they must come from OpenMeterClient. __enter__/__exit__ must delegate to super().

key_file_guides.role: Package entry point: extends __path__ for the namespace package and (in the populated facade) exports Client/VERSION/COMMIT plus _patch symbols.
key_file_guides.watch_for: A missing _patch_sdk() call silently disables all runtime patches; __all__ must extend from _patch_all.

key_file_guides.role: Discriminated Union type aliases for polymorphic API types (App, RateCard, Entitlement, ...), TYPE_CHECKING-safe via string forward references.
key_file_guides.watch_for: App is defined twice (generation artifact). All aliases must use string-quoted forward references, never direct class imports, or circular imports break module load.

key_file_guides.role: Single VERSION constant consumed by the facade __init__.py.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Regenerated by make gen-api — never hand-edit.

key_file_guides.role: Single COMMIT constant stamped at generation time.
PEP 561 marker signalling inline types to mypy/pyright.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Must not be deleted; type checkers ignore inline types without it.

anti_patterns: Defining new operation classes or methods directly in __init__.py or _client.py — all operations must come from _generated
Removing or relocating the _patch_sdk() call — runtime patches will silently not apply
Manually editing files under _generated/ — they are overwritten by make gen-api
Adding hard runtime imports of _patch symbols outside the try/except ImportError guard — causes ImportError when _patch.py is absent
Maintaining __all__ by hand without extending from _patch_all — breaks forward compatibility when new symbols are patched in

decisions.decision: Client subclasses generated OpenMeterClient rather than wrapping it
decisions.rationale: Inheritance gives automatic access to every generated operation attribute without proxying; constructor-level auth injection is the only customization needed.

decisions.decision: Optional _patch.py overlay with graceful ImportError fallback
decisions.rationale: _patch.py is the sole file preserved across regenerations as a customization boundary; the fallback keeps the package loadable in minimal deployments without it.

decisions.decision: Union type aliases isolated in _types.py with string forward references
decisions.rationale: Polymorphic API unions must reference _models without triggering circular imports at module load; string quotes defer resolution to type checkers.

code_examples.scenario: Defining the public Client with Bearer-token auth injection (the canonical pattern for this folder)
